vol_high_pattern.name: Volume and High Behavior Pattern
vol_high_pattern.comment: vol_high_pattern = compare(Volume, vol_lag1) + compare(High, high_lag1) = VolUp_HighUp | VolUp_HighDown | VolDown_HighUp | VolDown_HighDown

ibs_volume_pattern.name: IBS and Volume Behavior Pattern
ibs_volume_pattern.comment: ibs_volume_group = compare(Volume, vol_lag1) + compare(IBS, ibs_lag1) = VolUp_IBSUp | VolUp_IBSDown | VolDown_IBSUp | VolDown_IBSDown

high_rsi_pattern.name: High & RSI Pattern
high_rsi_pattern.comment: high_rsi_pattern = compare(High, high_lag1) + compare(RSI, rsi_lag1) = HighUp_RSIUp | HighUp_RSIDown | HighDown_RSIUp | HighDown_RSIDown

long_trend.name: Long Trend
long_trend.comment: StrongUp | StrongDown = EMA_1month > EMA_6months | EMA_1month < EMA_6months
